title: Flutter Clean Architecture
description: Learn how to structure professional Flutter apps with feature based folders, presentation, domain and data layers, entities, models, repositories, use cases, dependency flow, Riverpod integration, error handling, caching concepts, and a complete Clean Notes App project.

modules.title: Clean Architecture Foundations
lessons: Feature First vs Layer First Structure

modules.title: Repositories, Use Cases, and Services
lessons: Remote Data Source and Local Data Source

modules.title: Production App Architecture Project
lessons: Architecture for Auth and User Data
Architecture for Supabase and Firebase Apps
